top_signals.title: US Premarket Movers for June 12, 2026
top_signals.summary: S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.6% as of 7:36 a.m. in New York following fresh evidence that the US and Iran are nearing a provisional agreement to end their war. SpaceX made history with a $75 billion IPO that instantly turned it into one of the biggest public companies in the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Rally on US-Iran Deal Hopes; SpaceX Prepares Debut | Bloomberg Brief 6/12/2026
top_signals.summary: US stocks and bonds extend their rally as G7 officials say the US and Iran are nearing a deal around the G7 meeting next week. SpaceX prepares for its public debut after making history with a $75 billion IPO. Laura Cooper of Nuveen discusses the market impact of the US and Iran coming closer to an agreement. Rebecca Walser of Walser Wealth Management looks ahead to the public debut of SpaceX. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
top_signals.summary: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut on June 12.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
